title: Mixed Perfume Wax Melts: 16 x 6g Heart Shaped Melts in a Presentation Gift Box, 4 pcs Each of Angel, Alien, Black Opium and Creed Candle Alternative
features: ❤️ GET IN THE MOOD: With a choice of 4 of the top high street perfumes you can put yourslef in the mood to relax, party or get ready for a special occasion or romantic date with a special person
❤️ NEW GIFT BOX: The NEW range of Spotless Leopard My Heart Melts are packaged in a printed display box that can be given as great gifts for women, men, parents, work colleagues for all occasions
❤️ PROTECTIVE TRAY: Each Heart Melt is induvial poured directly into the protective tray this prevents, retains the scent longer, looks great and provides more protection in transit
❤️ LONG LASTING: highly scented wax melts - each heart wax melt will last upto 6 hours. Contains 16 x 5g heart shaped melts. Mixed Parfume Melts home comfort set gives you 96+ hours of aroma
❤️ WAX MELT GIFT SET: Heart Melts in the NEW beautifully designed display boxes are the perfect gifts for women, birthday gifts for her, wedding gifts, candles gifts for women or as teacher gifts
